title: Rename brand to “femme forms” and intensify glittery shimmer theme

requirements.summary: Update all visible brand text, accessible labels, and document metadata to consistently use “femme forms”.
acceptanceCriteria: Header brand label shows “femme forms” instead of “Art Shop”.
Footer copyright line shows “femme forms” instead of “Art Shop”.
Home page hero headline shows “femme forms” instead of “Sensual Sketches & Feminine Art”.
Header logo image alt text and other user-facing labels referencing the old name are updated to “femme forms”.
The HTML document <title> is updated to reflect “femme forms”.

file_operations.description: Replace the header brand label text and logo alt text from “Art Shop” to “femme forms” to ensure consistent visible and accessible branding.
Update footer copyright text to “femme forms” and adjust any remaining identifier strings/defaults that still reference “art-shop” to align with the new brand name.
Update the hero headline from “Sensual Sketches & Feminine Art” to “femme forms” (keep other English copy intact unless it contains the old brand name).
Update the HTML document <title> to reflect the “femme forms” brand name.

requirements.summary: Strengthen glitter/shimmer styling across header, hero, cards, and primary/outline buttons while maintaining readability and avoiding layout regressions in light/dark modes.
acceptanceCriteria: Shimmer overlay effect is visibly stronger than before on the header and hero background (e.g., increased shimmer opacity/contrast) while text remains readable.
Buttons using shimmer styles (e.g., primary CTA and outline buttons) have a noticeably stronger glitter/shimmer presence (e.g., stronger glow and/or animated shimmer) compared to the current build.
Card surfaces in listings/detail views show a consistent enhanced shimmer/glitter accent that matches the updated theme.
No layout regressions: navigation, mobile menu, and page content remain usable and legible in both light and dark modes.

file_operations.description: Increase shimmer intensity globally by strengthening shimmer utility classes (e.g., higher shimmer overlay opacity/contrast, stronger shimmer-glow, slightly brighter shimmer-border) and adding a subtle animated shimmer movement on .shimmer-overlay::before while ensuring text/readability (especially with the hero’s existing gradient overlay).
Ensure the header’s shimmer treatment remains strong and consistent after the global shimmer utility changes (keep mobile/desktop nav legible; adjust/extend class usage only if needed).

Enhance hero shimmer strength consistently with the updated theme (rely on updated .shimmer-overlay and existing gradient overlay; adjust section/button class usage only if needed to keep hero text readable).

Apply a consistent enhanced shimmer/glitter accent to artwork card surfaces (e.g., add shimmer overlay treatment to the card or card content in addition to existing shimmer-border/metallic-gradient) without reducing text/image clarity.
Apply the same enhanced shimmer/glitter surface treatment to jewelry card surfaces as used for artwork cards for consistent listings styling.
Ensure detail-view cards/surfaces (image container and attribute Card) reflect the enhanced shimmer treatment consistently (beyond just border) while keeping content legible in light/dark modes.

Strengthen shimmer on the inquiry card surface and primary submit button (and maintain shimmer-border on fields) so primary actions show a noticeably stronger glitter/shimmer presence without harming form readability.

Add enhanced shimmer styling to authentication action buttons via className (primary/default and outline variants) so key header buttons match the stronger glitter/shimmer treatment (do not modify UI library components; only compose via props/classes).
